name: arm-pick-place
title: Pick an object and place it on the target
summary: Composes a real LeRobot ACT checkpoint. The skill is the contract; the policy is a checkpoint reference. Same safety envelope and transport as every other skill.
task: Pick up the object and place it on the target

policy.runtime: LeRobot (.select_action) · Python bridge or on-device export
policy.note: A LeRobot checkpoint driven through its standard .select_action(obs) interface — swap the checkpoint string for a different one; the contract does not change.

post: object relocated onto the target within tolerance
